description: Style Notedunhill's Desire Blue comes in a flacon reminiscent of the ocean's breeze. An aromatic green fragrance, it was created by Phillippe Romano and launched in 2002.Product DetailsThe top notes litchi, mandarin orange, lotus and bergamot; middle notes are orange and Brazilian rosewood, sea notes and brazilian rosewood; base notes are tonka bean, amber, musk and benzoin.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
